title: Distinct Numbers in Window
hints: Use sliding window technique with a hashmap to count distinct elements.
Initialize hashmap with the first window of size B.
For each subsequent window, remove the leftmost element and add the rightmost element.
When an element's count becomes 0, remove it from the hashmap.
The size of the hashmap gives the count of distinct elements in the current window.
If B > N, return an empty array.
